civic issue + local news intelligence

Core Values

Built For Fast Civic Decisions

AI Credibility Layer

Every civic update receives a confidence signal so readers can quickly understand trust level before sharing.

Hyperlocal Mapping

Location-aware reports reveal hotspots in roads, sanitation, water, electricity, and neighborhood safety.

Built For Citizens, Media, and City Teams

Whether you are reporting a pothole, tracking flood updates, or monitoring misinformation, CivicLens gives you one place to publish, validate, and coordinate.

Trusted Signal

AI plus civic moderation improves confidence in local information.

Faster Escalation

Trending issue detection highlights urgent clusters quickly.

Trusted By Civic Contributors

Community groups, independent media, and local operations teams collaborate on one platform.

Metro Citizen Watch
Ward Action Collective
Civic Data Desk
Local Response Unit

Frequently Asked Questions

How does AI credibility scoring work?

CivicLens combines metadata checks, cross-post consistency, report signals, and community feedback to generate an initial confidence state.

Can I report issues with images from mobile?

Yes. You can create posts with location context and photos directly from phone, making field reports quick and actionable.

Who can view or use submitted reports?

Reports are visible to citizens and can be used by local volunteers, media groups, and civic departments for faster response workflows.
